creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 177821
4.7.0

Update to the latest v4.x LTS release. Remove patches to fix the V8
build with clang 3.8.0; upstream has incorporated these patches.

https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v4.7.0/

portlint: OK (-C, looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 11.0-R, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
testport: OK (poudriere: 11.0-R, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, BUNDLED_SSL)
